title: chaphaz #2648
definition:
1) to hurry, flee, hasten, fear, be terrified
    1a) (Qal) to be in a hurry, be alarmed
    1b) (Niphal) to be in a hurry
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to hurry, flee, hasten, fear, be terrified
    1a) (Qal) to be in a hurry, be alarmed
    1b) (Niphal) to be in a hurry

    NASB:  to be in trepidation, hurry or alarm
